subcodes.first_line: The beginning of all things is the recognition of God, glorified be His majesty, and the end thereof is steadfastness in His love. Thus hath the Pen spoken from His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول الامر عرفان الله جل جلاله و آخره الاستقامه علی حبه کذلک نطق القلم من لدن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment
full_text_parts: The beginning of all things is the knowledge of God, and the end of all things is strict observance of whatsoever hath been sent down from the empyrean of the Divine Will that pervadeth all that is in the heavens and all that is on the earth.
